summary: Iteration 18 - Branch Orders with Recipe System Testing Complete. All 20 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend E2E tests passed for Branch Orders page including new order dialog, product selection, recipe display, and order details with raw materials deducted.
passed_tests: POST /api/inventory - Create raw material for testing
POST /api/finished-products - Create finished product with recipe
POST /api/branch-orders - Create order with auto raw material deduction

finished_products_api.notes: GET/POST /api/finished-products - CRUD operations for finished products with recipes

raw_materials_api.notes: GET /api/raw-materials - Returns inventory items with item_type='raw'

branch_orders_api.notes: GET/POST /api/branch-orders - Creates orders with automatic raw material deduction from recipes

branch_orders_page.notes: Page displays orders list with tabs (outgoing/incoming), status filter, and new order button

new_order_dialog.notes: Dialog shows branch selector, priority selector, finished product selector with availability, quantity input, and notes

recipe_display_in_order.notes: When adding products to order, shows raw materials needed from recipe

order_details_dialog.notes: Shows order info, finished products, raw materials deducted (highlighted in blue), total cost, and notes

auto_raw_material_deduction.notes: When branch order is created, raw materials from product recipes are automatically deducted from main warehouse inventory

critical_code_review_comments: Branch orders API correctly deducts raw materials based on finished product recipes
Finished products store recipe with raw_material_id, quantity, and calculated cost
Order details show raw_materials_deducted array with material name, quantity, and unit
Frontend correctly displays available quantity for finished products in dropdown
Recipe system info banner explains the automatic deduction feature to users
seed_data_creation: Created test raw materials and finished products with TEST_ prefix during testing. Cleanup performed at end of tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 completed. New recipe system features all working: 1) GET /api/finished-products - returns products with recipes (raw material ingredients), 2) GET /api/raw-materials - returns inventory items with item_type='raw', 3) POST /api/branch-orders - creates orders from finished products and automatically deducts raw materials from main warehouse based on recipes, 4) Branch Orders page (/branch-orders) - displays orders with tabs, filters, new order dialog with product selection showing availability, 5) Order details show raw materials deducted section. The system correctly tracks: finished products -> recipes -> raw materials -> automatic deduction on order creation.
